jobs.name: morning-ops
jobs.message: Execute Morning Ops per standing orders. Update the morning brief and today-board surfaces. Send fallback text only if action is needed.

jobs.name: evening-wrap
jobs.message: Execute Evening Wrap per standing orders. Update wrap surface and task rollover summary.

jobs.name: weekly-agenda
jobs.message: Execute Weekly Agenda per standing orders. Compile exec agenda and update shell surfaces.

jobs.name: kaizen-review
jobs.message: Execute Kaizen Review per standing orders. Summarize friction, propose system changes, and update shell digest.

_instructions:
To add these cron jobs to your OpenClaw gateway, run:
  openclaw cron add --name <name> --cron <cron> --tz <timezone> --timeout-seconds <timeout> --message <message>

Or use the OpenClaw API / control UI to configure them.
